display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands the name as Command-line Interface File Manager; official wiki uses Clifm.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki provides detailed documentation; official GitHub README is the project entry point.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/leo-arch/clifm; per instructions repo is null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a command-line file manager; official repository describes it as shell-like and terminal-based.
